retrieved_verses.sanskrit: कर्मण्येवाधिकारस्ते मा फलेषु कदाचन। मा कर्मफलहेतुर्भूर्मा ते सङ्गोऽस्त्वकर्मणि।।

description: Placeholder regression case — the production sakha.regression.jsonl with 50 real test cases lives in the proprietary commercial repo and is loaded in production via PROMPTS_DIR override.
